import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for v in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
for t in tokens
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
